instruction: An average cost function is AC(x) = {num_a} / (x - {excl}). Find the domain and explain why x = {excl} must be excluded.
steps: The average cost is undefined when x = {excl} (denominator = 0).
Domain: all x > 0, x ≠ {excl}. In context, x must also be positive (can't produce negative units).
